scripts.doctor:mobile-resolution: node -e "const r=(target,paths)=>require.resolve(target,{paths}); const v=(target,paths)=>require(r(target,paths)).version; console.log('mobile react',v('react/package.json',['./apps/mobile']),r('react/package.json',['./apps/mobile'])); console.log('expo react',v('react/package.json',['./node_modules/expo']),r('react/package.json',['./node_modules/expo'])); console.log('expo-router react',v('react/package.json',['./node_modules/expo-router']),r('react/package.json',['./node_modules/expo-router'])); console.log('mobile react-native',v('react-native/package.json',['./apps/mobile']),r('react-native/package.json',['./apps/mobile'])); console.log('root react-native',v('react-native/package.json',['./']),r('react-native/package.json',['./'])); console.log('mobile expo',v('expo/package.json',['./apps/mobile']),r('expo/package.json',['./apps/mobile'])); console.log('mobile expo-router',v('expo-router/package.json',['./apps/mobile']),r('expo-router/package.json',['./apps/mobile']));"
scripts.bundle:android:smoke: cd apps/mobile && npx expo export --platform android --output-dir /tmp/pitch-therapy-android-export
